passive.name: Martial Cadence
passive.description: Jarvan's first basic attack on an enemy deals bonus physical damage based on their current Health. This effect cannot occur again on the same enemy for a few seconds.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Jarvan IV}} basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} equal to a portion of the {{as|target's '''current''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: This effect cannot occur on the same target more than once every few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Jarvan IV's''' [[basic attack]]s are empowered to deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} equal to {{as|8% of the target's '''current''' health}}, with a minimum threshold of 20 and capped at 400 against non-{{tip|champion}} targets.
wiki_detail.description2: This effect cannot occur on the same target more than once every few seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Martial Cadence's'' damage is based on the current health of the target before any damage of the attack has been dealt.
* ''Martial Cadence's'' damage is dealt after the main attack damage.
** If the target dies to the main attack damage, the additional damage will not be dealt.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[structures]].

Q.name: Dragon Strike
Q.description: Jarvan IV extends his lance, dealing physical damage and lowering the Armor of enemies in its path. Additionally, this will pull Jarvan to his Demacian Standard, knocking up enemies in his path.
Q.tooltip:
Jarvan extends his lance, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage and removing {{ e2 }}% Armor for {{ e3 }} seconds.

If the lance connects with Demacian Standard, Jarvan will pull himself to it, Knocking Up those in his path for 0.75 seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Jarvan IV}} extends his lance in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} enemies hit and {{sti|lethality|{{as|reducing their armor|armor}}}} for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the lance connects with a deployed ''{{ai|Demacian Standard|Jarvan IV}}'', he will {{tip|dash}} to its location, {{tip|airborne|knocking up}} enemies he passes by.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Jarvan IV''' extends his lance in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and inflicting them with {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|armor reduction}}}} for 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|80 to 240}} {{as|(+ 140% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}{{st|Armor Reduction|{{as|{{ap|10 to 26}}% of target's armor}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: If the lance connects with a deployed ''{{ai|Demacian Standard|Jarvan IV}}'', '''Jarvan IV''' {{tip|dashes}} to its location, {{tip|airborne|knocking up}} nearby enemies around him and along his path for {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Jarvan IV''' can cast any of his [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash.''
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|65|Minimum distance}} - {{tt|785|Maximum range}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|0|Flag detection minimum distance}} - {{tt|850|Flag detection maximum range}}
wiki_detail.width: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|136|Damage area width}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|300|Flag detection width}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The armor reduction is applied after the damage. The damage dealt does not benefit from it in this case.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* ''Dragon Strike'' will still pull '''Jarvan IV''' to {{ai|Demacian Standard|Jarvan IV}} even if he is {{tip|immobilize|immobilized}} or {{tip|ground|grounded}}.
* {{si|Flash}} will interrupt the {{tip|dash}} to a {{ai|Demacian Standard|Jarvan IV}} but '''Jarvan IV''' will still {{tip|airborne|knock up}} and damage enemies he comes in contact with at the new location.
** Casting ''Flash'' right before the ''dash'' begins will cause '''Jarvan IV''' to be pulled to the flag from the new position.
** Enemies already hit by ''Dragon Strike'' cannot be affected more than once.
* The {{tip|airborne|knockup}} also slightly moves the target, landing 50-100 units in a random direction.

W.name: Golden Aegis
W.description: Jarvan IV calls upon the ancient kings of Demacia to shield him from harm and slow surrounding enemies.
W.tooltip: Jarvan summons an aegis, Slowing nearby enemies by {{ e2 }}% for {{ e5 }} seconds and granting him a {{ baseshield }} Shield, increased by {{ bonusshield }} for each enemy champion hit.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Jarvan IV}} {{tip|slow|slows}} nearby enemies for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: He will also {{tip|shield}} himself for a few seconds, with the strength increased if he hit more enemy {{tip|champions}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Jarvan IV''' {{tip|slow|slows}} all nearby enemies for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Jarvan IV''' also grants himself a {{tip|shield}} for 4 seconds, increased by {{as|{{fd|1.3}}% of his '''maximum''' health}} for each enemy {{tip|champion}} hit by ''Golden Aegis''.
wiki_detail.notes: * ''Golden Aegis' ''detonation triggers in-[[Combat status|combat]] effects by dealing 0 {{tip|proc damage|proc}} {{tip|true damage}}, such as drawing turret aggro, {{ri|Sudden Impact}} and applying {{ii|Elixir of Sorcery}}.

E.name: Demacian Standard
E.description: Jarvan IV carries the pride of Demacia, passively granting him bonus Attack Speed. Activating Demacian Standard allows Jarvan IV to place a Demacian flag that deals magic damage on impact and grants Attack Speed to nearby allied champions.
E.tooltip:
Passive: Jarvan gains {{ permanentattackspeed*100 }}% Attack Speed.

Active: Jarvan throws a standard into the ground, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and granting allies near the standard {{ e3 }}% Attack Speed for {{ e4 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Jarvan IV''' plants a flag at the target location that deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.blurb3: The flag lingers for a period, emitting an aura that grants {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} to '''Jarvan''' and allied champions.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Jarvan IV''' throws a Demacian flag to the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within the area.
wiki_detail.description3: The flag then remains for 8 seconds, granting {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings and providing an [[aura]] that grants ''Demacian Standard's'' passive {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}} to all nearby allied champions as well as '''Jarvan IV''' {{tt|himself|See notes}}.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Demacian Standard will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.grounded:
|notes        = 
* The attack speed granted from a deployed ''Demacian Standard'' {{tip|stacks additively}} with ''Demacian Standard's'' passive permanent bonus attack speed to '''Jarvan''', but the aura from multiple ''Demacian Standards'' does not stack.
* The flag has a {{fd|13.6}} {{tip|pathing radius}} and a 65 {{tip|gameplay radius}}.
** The gameplay radius matters to {{ai|Dragon Strike|Jarvan IV}}.
* ''Demacian Standard'' can be targeted by allied abilities ({{si|Teleport}}, {{ai|Safeguard|Lee Sin}}). The target type is the same as a {{tip|minion}}.
* ''Demacian Standard'' is {{tip|untargetable}} to enemies.

R.name: Cataclysm
R.description: Jarvan IV heroically leaps into battle at a target with such force that he terraforms the surrounding area to create an arena around them. Nearby enemies are damaged at the moment of impact.
R.tooltip:
Jarvan heroically leaps to an enemy Champion, dealing {{ damagecalc }} physical damage to them and surrounding enemies and creating an arena of impassable terrain around them for {{ wallduration }} seconds.

Jarvan can Recast to collapse the terrain.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Jarvan IV}} {{tip|dash|leaps}} {{tip|displacement immune|Unstoppably}} to the target enemy champion's location, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies upon impact.
wiki_detail.blurb2: He then erects a circle of [[terrain]] that lasts for a short time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Jarvan IV''' {{tip|dash|leaps}} with {{tip|displacement immunity}} to the target enemy champion's location over {{fd|0.35}} seconds, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to all nearby enemies upon arrival.
wiki_detail.description2: Upon impact, he creates a circle of impassable terrain that {{tip|airborne|knocks aside}} enemies within the perimeter over {{fd|0.15}} seconds, knocking them out of the circle if they are on the outer edge and pulling them in otherwise. The terrain lasts for {{fd|3.5}} seconds and grants {{tip|sight}} of the area. ''Cataclysm'' can be recast after {{fd|0.75}} seconds while the terrain is present.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Jarvan IV''' destroys the terrain created by ''Cataclysm''.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tt|350|Terrain creation radius}} / {{tip|sight|icononly = true}}{{tt|1700|Sight range (from center of the whole structure)}}
wiki_detail.notes:
*The initial cast and the manual recast count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
**If the ability is not manually recasted, the secondary effect will trigger without being considered as an ability activation.
* ''Cataclysm'' will not deal damage, generate terrain, nor refund its cooldown if '''Jarvan IV''' is killed while {{tip|dash|leaping}}.
* The perimeter is made up of 24 units with 95 {{tip|pathing radius}}, 65 {{tip|gameplay radius}} and 1350 {{tip|sight}} radius each. Only every other unit is rendered visible.
* {{ai|Searing Charge|Ornn}} will not destroy the whole ring but only the part that {{ci|Ornn}} collides with.
